appraisal_events.evidence: « Je prendrai le thé ce soir ... J’espère que vous me ferez le plaisir de venir avec Madame votre grand’mère. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Charlus, after not having spoken to the narrator, personally invites him (and his grandmother) to take tea in Mme de Villeparisis’s apartment, signaling inclusion and conferring prestige by association with the Guermantes.

status_effects.explanation: He is explicitly included in a socially valued private gathering hosted within the Guermantes circle.
